_comment: sArthI MCP server registry — single source of truth. setup.sh iterates this via inject-mcp.py. Add new servers here; no hardcoding elsewhere. Variables: ${HOME}, ${SARTHI_ROOT}.

mcp-jira._comment: Jira MCP — already registered by Wibey. Listed here for reference only.

sarthi-airflow-read._comment: sArthI local stdio Airflow MCP server. 5 read-only tools: list_dags, get_dag_runs, get_task_instances, get_task_log, get_dag_topology.

sarthi-airflow-auth._comment: sArthI Airflow session refresh. Single tool: refresh_session. Headless Playwright ~84s.

sarthi-airflow-ops._comment: sArthI Airflow mutation server. 6 tools: clear_task, clear_task_with_deps, set_dag_run_state, trigger_dag_run, get_dag_run_state, poll_task. Requires ops_allowed:true per env.

sarthi-snow._comment: sArthI ServiceNow MCP. 3 tools: get_crq, parse_crq_file, create_crq_draft. Draft-only — never auto-submits.

sarthi-snow-auth._comment: sArthI ServiceNow session refresh. Single tool: refresh_session (~30s, PingFed SSO).

sarthi-gcp._comment: sArthI GCP read-only MCP. 7 tools: gcs_ls, gcs_stat, gcs_cat, dataproc_list, dataproc_describe, dataproc_fetch_driver_log, hudi_timeline. Auth: gcloud ADC.

sarthi-msgraph._comment: sArthI Microsoft Graph MCP. 10 tools. Auth: msgraph_tokens.json. MSGRAPH_SEND_ALLOWED=true required for send tools. Never calls auth.ts login — cron-safe.

sarthi-bq._comment: sArthI BigQuery MCP. 5 tools. Wraps bigquery-explorer skill. Auth: gcloud ADC. 1GB cost cap. SELECT-only. Cron-safe.

sarthi-git._comment: sArthI GitHub/GEC Git MCP. 7 tools: git_get_file, git_list_dir, git_search_code, git_get_pr, git_list_prs, git_create_pr, git_get_commit. Auth: gh CLI keyring.

_requires_binaries.install_hint: gh CLI: install via Walmart Artifactory — ask your team for the internal Artifactory path. Do NOT use brew or public install methods on Walmart network. After install run: gh auth login --hostname gecgithub01.walmart.com

sarthi-wcnp._comment: sArthI WCNP/Kubernetes MCP. Read + ops tools for kubectl via sledge-authenticated clusters. Config: ~/.wibey/sarthi/wcnp-clusters.yaml. Auth: run 'sledge connect <cluster>' once manually.

_requires_binaries.install_hint: Run: bash ~/sarthi/setup.sh (auto-installs). Manual: KUBECTL_VERSION=$(curl -sf https://generic.ci.artifacts.walmart.com/artifactory/dl-k8s-io-generic-release-remote/release/stable.txt) && curl -LO https://generic.ci.artifacts.walmart.com/artifactory/dl-k8s-io-generic-release-remote/release/${KUBECTL_VERSION}/bin/darwin/amd64/kubectl && chmod +x kubectl && mv kubectl ~/.local/bin/
Run: bash ~/sarthi/setup.sh (auto-installs). Manual: curl -sL http://wmlink.wal-mart.com/getSledgeCore | sh -  (must be on Walmart network/VPN). After install: sledge connect <cluster-name>.

sarthi-slack._comment: sArthI Slack MCP. 6 tools wrapping the slack-api Wibey skill. Auth: Playwright SSO bootstrap from Slack desktop session (xoxc token + fingerprint, ~2h cache). SLACK_SEND_ALLOWED=true required for post_message.
_auth_steps: npm config set registry https://npm.ci.artifacts.walmart.com/artifactory/api/npm/npme-npm && cd ~/.wibey/skills/slack-api && npm install && node_modules/.bin/playwright install chromium
cd ~/.wibey/skills/slack-api && node scripts/reauth.js   (browser opens — complete Walmart SSO)
sarthi-slack._install_note: Wraps slack-api Wibey skill. No extra Python packages needed. Node.js 18+ required.

sarthi-gsuite._comment: sArthI GSuite/AD group MCP. 2 tools: gsuite_get_principal_groups (user/SA/processID → groups), gsuite_get_group_members (group → all members). Auth: gcloud ADC (no session file — token fetched fresh per call). Bypasses corporate proxy for cloud-services.wal-mart.com.

sarthi-trino._comment: sArthI Trino/Hudi MCP. 11 tools wrapping Dengy's hive_explorer CLI against presto-datadiscovery.walmart.com:8443. Read-only: list/describe/query Hudi+Hive tables. Auth: macOS Keychain (run --set-password once). No plaintext passwords stored.

sarthi-snow-ad._comment: sArthI ServiceNow AD Group Request MCP. 4 tools: ad_group_add_user, ad_group_add_multi_user, ad_group_add_multi_group, ad_group_smart. Uses Selenium+Chrome browser automation (headed) against Walmart ServiceNow portal. Requires scripts/snow-ad-automation/ and Google Chrome. Auth: reuses chrome_profile from sarthi-snow-auth first-time-auth.sh.

_requires_binaries.install_hint: Google Chrome is required for ServiceNow automation. Download from https://www.google.com/chrome/

_auth_steps: Run scripts/first-time-auth.sh step 4 (ServiceNow) to populate chrome_profile
Chrome window will open for SSO if chrome_profile session has expired
